title: Add support for `Op_File.Actions.FileAction_Copy.AllowWildcard`
body:
Tracks the `Op_File.Actions.FileAction_Copy.AllowWildcard` item from https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/6732

Add support for controlling whether source paths are expanded as glob patterns during copy operations, aligning with BuildKit's `FileActionCopy.AllowWildcard`. Currently glob expansion is always enabled. This adds an explicit flag so callers can disable it and treat paths as literals.                                                                                     

- [ ] Add `AddAndCopyOptions.AllowWildcard` (type: `types.OptionalBool`), default true                                              
- [ ] Add `copier.StatOptions.AllowWildcard`                  
- [ ] Add `copier.GetOptions.AllowWildcard`                                                                                         
- [ ] Add unit tests in copier package                        
- [ ] Add `--allow-wildcard` to `buildah add` and `buildah copy`, default true                                                      
- [ ] Add integration tests
